description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing Physical DMG. On a Critical Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound].

Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away. The damage of this skill is increased by 20% per [Wound] stack, and all [Wound] stacks are consumed on the final hit.
[Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}%, and [(added) reduces the target's P.Block Chance by 500 for 10 sec -> (removed) increases Armor Penetration by 800 while casting].
[Sharp End] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and recovers additional {0} MP upon a Crit Hit for the skill's duration.
Each time a Critical Hit occurs, for 15 sec own Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to 8 times.
